name: Get Reuse Isolation Probe
description: Test fixture for scripts/smoke/get-reuse-isolation-smoke.mjs: probes the Worker Loader get() warm-isolate reuse invariants (warm-reuse detection, per-call body correctness, cross-user data isolation, direct-binding fail-closed) against a live staging deployment with EXECUTED_LOADER_GET_REUSE=1. Reuse-eligible (storage only, no cross-Agent calls). Stays private; never goes live.

reuseProbe.description: Returns { callCount, warm } from a module-level counter. warm=true on a warm-reused isolate (loader.get); always callCount=1 under loader.load.

echo.description: Returns { value } echoing the per-call arg — proves body-borne args are correct even on a warm isolate.

storeMine.description: Stores a per-user value under a fixed key via galactic.store (userId-scoped host-side).

value.description: Value to store for the calling user.

readMine.description: Reads back the calling user's stored value. Must return null for a user who never stored (cross-user isolation).

directBypass.description: Attempts a raw RPC binding call WITHOUT the per-call context handle. Must be refused (fail closed) on a reusable isolate.
